text:
Once upon a time in a lush, green forest, there was a little squirrel named Sunny who loved to play and explore. Every day, Sunny would scamper from tree to tree, collecting nuts and chasing butterflies. But one sunny afternoon, as Sunny was climbing a tall oak tree to gather acorns, he noticed something peculiar.

Perched on a branch not far away was a small bird, injured and unable to fly. Sunny, being the kind-hearted squirrel, decided to help. He carefully approached the bird and gently picked it up, carrying it back to his cozy home under the roots of the oak tree.

For days, Sunny nursed the bird back to health, bringing it acorns and leaves for sustenance. Slowly but surely, the bird regained its strength and was able to fly again. One morning, when the bird was fully recovered, it perched on a nearby branch, looking at Sunny with grateful eyes.

To thank Sunny, the bird sang the most beautiful melody Sunny had
